voices.lens: MIT AI researcher and long-form interviewer. Approaches politics with academic curiosity. Hosts leaders from all sides.

quotes.quote:
The power of AI agents comes from:
1. intelligence of the underlying model
2. how much access you give it to all your data
3. how much freedom & power you give it to act on your behalf

I think for 2 & 3, security is the biggest problem. And very soon, if not already, security will become THE bottle

this was an honor! Also took all day 😅

quotes.quote:

Amazon’s AI Downgraded Women...

Their AI system learned that “women” didn’t match past hires.

That’s not sci-fi.

That happened. Now they say it is fixed...

voices.lens: Tech journalist and podcast host. Covers the intersection of tech, power, and politics. Holds Silicon Valley accountable.

quotes.quote: Either Altman is lying in this story, or the Anthropic ban was completely pointless.

You know, it's funny. Earlier this week I had started to write a follow up to my "Fascism For First Time Founders" post that tried to explain to Silicon Valley how embracing fascists would destroy innovation... but now I need to spend the weekend rewriting the whole thing with a new Exhibit A.
